info.title: Downtime and Speed Loss
info.description: You can use this service to report when manufacturing operations do not run smoothly due to unexpected downtime or speed loss.

regionHost.description: The data center where SAP Digital Manufacturing is provisioned for your organization

tokenHost.description: The authentication token server where SAP Digital Manufacturing is provisioned for your organization

post.description: Create a new speed loss with Reason Code tagged. You can tag the existing un-tagged speed loss with a reason code for a given duration.

parameters.name: request
parameters.description: Request object to create speed loss.

201.description: Speed loss has been created successfully.

400.description: The HTTP request is bad or invalid and cannot be processed by the server.

401.description: You are not authorized to call this resource.

403.description: Accessing the resource you are trying to reach is forbidden.

404.description: One of the related elements is not found.

500.description: There was an internal error somewhere in the call chain.

post.description: Create a downtime for one or more resources of the selected work center. You can create downtime for a specific date or date range and assign a reason code.

400.description: The HTTP request is bad or invalid and cannot be processed by the server.

401.description: You are not authorized to call this resource.

403.description: Accessing the resource you are trying to reach is forbidden.

404.description: One of the related elements is not found.

SpeedLossCreateRequest.description: A request to report speed loss

operationActivity.description: Operation Activity for reporting speed loss.

resource.description: Resource name for reporting speed loss.

resourceReasonCodeId.description: Reason code Id(Key Id) for reporting speed loss.

date.description: Date on which speed loss is reported in yyyy-MM-dd format.

shift.description: Shift Name for reporting speed loss.

duration.description: Duration of speed loss in milliseconds.

plant.description: The plant to which the resource belong and for this resource, the downtime is created.

resource.description: Resource for which the downtime is created.

status.description: Status of the resource during downtime.

startDateTime.description: The time when the downtime starts ( UTC timestamp format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ssZ). Required if duration is not provided.

endDateTime.description: The time when the downtime ends (UTC timestamp format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss.Z). Required if duration is not provided.

duration.description: Duration of the downtime in seconds. Required if startDateTime and endDateTime are not provided.

markParentDown.description: Reported downtime will mark line as down.

reasonCode1.description: Reason code at level 1 in the hierarchy.

reasonCode2.description: Reason code at level 2 in the hierarchy.

reasonCode3.description: Reason code at level 3 in the hierarchy.

reasonCode4.description: Reason code at level 4 in the hierarchy.

reasonCode5.description: Reason code at level 5 in the hierarchy.

reasonCode6.description: Reason code at level 6 in the hierarchy.

reasonCode7.description: Reason code at level 7 in the hierarchy.

reasonCode8.description: Reason code at level 8 in the hierarchy.

reasonCode9.description: Reason code at level 9 in the hierarchy.

reasonCode10.description: Reason code at level 10 in the hierarchy.

causeMessage.description: Contains technical reason for the error.
